title: Pranafoxxils!
description: A custom Minecraft modpack based around fossils, farming, and building contraptions with Essential multiplayer.
body:
First officially published version!

Pranafoxxils! is a custom modpack made by me, Pranafox, designed to play with my friends and enjoy some of my favorite Minecraft mods on Fabric 1.18.2.

Explore the world! Build comfortable, cozy farmstead with a functional windmill; a train station; a fully automated cake factory; even, dare I say, your own prehistoric animal sanctuary! Take to the skies or the high seas, cook a variety of foods, and never forget to be a friend to blahaj, even as you venture towards the stars.
